title: DISCARD
complexity: O(N), when N is the number of queued commands

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Flushes all previously queued commands in a [transaction][tt] and restores the connection state to normal. [tt]: /develop/interact/transactions If [`WATCH`]() was used, `DISCARD` unwatches all keys watched by the connection. ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Simple string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#simple-strings): `OK`. **RESP3:** [Simple string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#simple-strings): `OK`.
intro:
Flushes all previously queued commands in a [transaction][tt] and restores the
connection state to normal.

[tt]: /develop/interact/transactions

If [`WATCH`]() was used, `DISCARD` unwatches all keys watched by the connection.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Flushes all previously queued commands in a [transaction][tt] and restores the
connection state to normal.

[tt]: /develop/interact/transactions

If [`WATCH`]() was used, `DISCARD` unwatches all keys watched by the connection.
